topic: How photos on your Google listing affect calls
caption:
Google ranks listings with photos higher in local search.
Add at least 10 real photos to your Google Business profile this week.
Shot of your storefront, your team, your finished work. That's it.
Buyers in the High Desert search before they call. Give them something to see.
Want a site that backs up that listing? Link in bio.

#HighDesert #Victorville #Hesperia #AppleValley #LocalSEO #SmallBusiness #SmallBusinessOwner #WebDesign #WebsiteDesign #VeteranOwned #InlandEmpire #GoogleBusiness #LocalSearch #HighDesertBusiness
alt_text: A small business owner photographs their storefront on a smartphone to upload to their Google Business listing.

copy.headline: Your Photos Are Getting You More Calls
copy.body: Google listings with more photos get more clicks, more direction requests, more calls. A few real images of your shop, crew, or work can change what a local search looks like for you.
copy.caption:
Google ranks listings with photos higher in local search.
Add at least 10 real photos to your Google Business profile this week.
Shot of your storefront, your team, your finished work. That's it.
Buyers in the High Desert search before they call. Give them something to see.
Want a site that backs up that listing? Link in bio.
copy.alt_text: A small business owner photographs their storefront on a smartphone to upload to their Google Business listing.
